body: review-spec cycle 1: REQUEST_CHANGES (2 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM, 2 LOW). Addressed: AC-05 reframed as first-class core verb (not CLI rewrap); AC-06 split predicates and dropped force-share with spec_close; AC-08 authorises both wrapper-first and rewrite-then-delete orderings; AC-01 missing-id case named. Skipped: AC-12 split (reviewer marked low-impact). Re-fork at cycle 2.
